magic_link_ttl_hours.description: Hours before an invite magic-link expires (default 168 = 7 days)

password_history_count.description: Number of previous passwords that may not be reused (0 = disabled)

force_mfa_for_role.description: JSON object mapping role names to boolean — e.g. {"Maker":true,"Checker":true}

force_sso_for_tenant.description: When true, password login is blocked and only SAML SSO is accepted
